puzzle.hint: This verse describes Allah's companionship and support for believers who possess two key qualities: piety and excellence in deeds.
puzzle.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّٱلَّذِينَ هُم مُّحْسِنُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Indeed, Allāh is with those who fear Him and those who are doers of good.
